annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: historical time and national circumstance are represented as a ledger or journal entry
Historical situation is understood through written/accounting records.
cmt.rival_reading: Events under the sun are not literally a ledger, but the sentence frames history through accounting.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: entering historical life as public actors
Political-historical life is understood through theatrical staging.
cmt.rival_reading: Collective historical existence is explicitly framed as appearing on a stage.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: uprear / edifice / transmit / unprofaned / undecayed / untorn

entailments: building political institutions of liberty and rights
preserving and handing on political liberties and institutions
Institutions are understood through built structure.
cmt.rival_reading: Political institutions are explicitly construed as a built edifice.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 6 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: foreign military danger imagined as a giant body attacking physically
Geopolitical threat is understood through bodily combat with a giant.
cmt.rival_reading: An overseas army is personified as a giant capable of bodily attack.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 4 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: danger, disorder, or ambitious men arise within the polity
Political emergence is understood through upward growth.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract danger or political actors are represented as emerging upward like growth.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: the nation would cause and complete its own destruction
Collective causation is understood through making or authoring a work.
cmt.rival_reading: Political destruction is framed through authorship and completion.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: the nation continues in political existence
the nation ceases to exist politically
self-caused national political destruction
Political existence is understood through bodily or organismic life.
cmt.rival_reading: A nation is not a biological organism, but it is construed as capable of living.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: public passions are characterized as uncontrolled agents rather than judgments
Political emotion is understood through embodied agency.
cmt.rival_reading: Passions and judgment are abstract faculties but are treated as agents with temperaments.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: mob violence is not produced by climate
Social disorder is understood through animate creation.
cmt.rival_reading: A social phenomenon is treated as a creature with an origin.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: danger, disorder, or ambitious men arise within the polity
Political emergence is understood through upward growth.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract danger or political actors are represented as emerging upward like growth.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: hanged bodies are compared with moss-like drapery in the forest
Mob killing is understood through visual covering/ornament.
cmt.rival_reading: The sentence explicitly compares corpses on trees with moss or drapery.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: a person killed by mob violence is framed as a sacrificial victim
Mob killing is understood through sacrifice.
cmt.rival_reading: The killing is historical violence, not a ritual offering, but is named through sacrificial vocabulary.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: people are imagined as removed from the arena of life
Life is understood through theatrical staging.
cmt.rival_reading: Human death or removal is framed through theatrical stage imagery.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: faces / fall / victims / ravages / walls / erected / defense / trodden

entailments: law-abiding people are overcome by mob violence
legal protections are represented as walls defending persons and property
Civic injury is understood through bodily attack.
cmt.rival_reading: Political-legal harm is represented through bodily orientation, falling, and ravaging.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 8 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: government is treated as a harmful or destructible entity
Political institutions are understood through harmful/destructible bodies or objects.
cmt.rival_reading: Government is abstract-institutional but construed as an entity that can be bane or be annihilated.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: patriotic obligation and violation of law are framed through blood, trampling, and tearing
Civic obligation is understood through bodily sacrifice and material violation.
cmt.rival_reading: Revolutionary inheritance and legal liberty are treated as bodily/material things that can be spilled, trampled, or torn.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: the nation or government continues or ceases political existence
Political survival is understood through organismic life and death.
cmt.rival_reading: A polity is not a biological organism, but its political existence is construed as bodily life or death.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: patriotic obligation and violation of law are framed through blood, trampling, and tearing
Civic obligation is understood through bodily sacrifice and material violation.
cmt.rival_reading: Revolutionary inheritance and legal liberty are treated as bodily/material things that can be spilled, trampled, or torn.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: patriotic obligation and violation of law are framed through blood, trampling, and tearing
Civic obligation is understood through bodily sacrifice and material violation.
cmt.rival_reading: Revolutionary inheritance and legal liberty are treated as bodily/material things that can be spilled, trampled, or torn.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 4 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: reverence for law is framed as religious devotion and ritual sacrifice
Civic obedience is understood through religion and sacrifice.
cmt.rival_reading: Legal-political reverence is explicitly understood through religious ritual vocabulary.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: reverence for law is framed as religious devotion and ritual sacrifice
Civic obedience is understood through religion and sacrifice.
cmt.rival_reading: Legal-political reverence is explicitly understood through religious ritual vocabulary.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 4 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: early supports for government are represented as structural props that decay
Political stability is understood through built structure.
cmt.rival_reading: Institutional maintenance is framed through structural support and material decay.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 4 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: self-government is treated as a trial whose truth can be demonstrated
Political viability is understood through experiment and demonstration.
cmt.rival_reading: A political order is not a laboratory object, but its success is framed as a trial or proof.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: self-government is treated as a trial whose truth can be demonstrated
Political viability is understood through experiment and demonstration.
cmt.rival_reading: A political order is not a laboratory object, but its success is framed as a trial or proof.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: founders' destiny is bound to the political experiment
Commitment is understood through physical fastening.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract destiny and ambition are represented as attached to an undertaking.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: fame or memory persists or disappears as life, deathlessness, or downward sinking
Historical memory is understood through life/death and vertical motion.
cmt.rival_reading: Reputation and memory are treated through bodily life/death or physical descent.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: fame or memory persists or disappears as life, deathlessness, or downward sinking

cmt.rival_reading: Reputation and memory are treated through bodily life/death or physical descent.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: political glory and ambition are represented as hunting or harvest
Political ambition is understood through hunting and harvest.
cmt.rival_reading: Ambition and fame are not literal game or crops, but are framed through hunting and agriculture.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 3 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

Political ambition is understood through embodied force and animal/combat imagery.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract ambition is repeatedly construed through embodied motion, animal rank, appetite, and fire.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 4 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

Collective memory and emotion are understood through embodied or visual states.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract passions and memories are treated as bodies, agents, or lights.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: living / history / family / history / bearing / testimonies / history / read

entailments: Revolutionary veterans and family memory are treated as living/readable history
ambition and genius are represented through animals, height, paths, bodily appetite, fire, or stretching
Collective memory is understood through living bodies and written testimony.
cmt.rival_reading: Historical memory is embodied in persons and wounds as if it were a living readable document.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 8 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: fortress / strength / artillery / time / leveling / walls

entailments: living revolutionary memory is represented as a fortress destroyed by time's artillery
Historical memory is understood through military fortification and attack.
cmt.rival_reading: Memory is not a fortification, and time does not literally fire artillery.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 6 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: forest / oaks / hurricane / trunk / verdure / foliage / murmur / breezes / limbs / storms / sink

entailments: the Revolutionary generation is represented as a damaged forest of trees
fame or memory persists or disappears as life, deathlessness, or downward sinking
Historical generations are understood through trees and weather.
cmt.rival_reading: Human generations and memory are explicitly construed as trees weathered by storms.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 11 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

instances.span_text: pillars / temple / liberty / crumbled / temple / fall / supply / pillars / hewn / quarry / reason

entailments: liberty and institutions are represented as a temple supported by pillars of reason
Liberty is understood through sacred architecture.
cmt.rival_reading: Political liberty and rational support are explicitly construed as architectural materials.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 11 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: reason, passion, and Washington's memory are represented through enemies, materials, support, sleep, and awakening
Civic memory and reason are understood through bodies and construction materials.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract civic faculties and memorial expectation are treated through bodily and material processes.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: reason, passion, and Washington's memory are represented through enemies, materials, support, sleep, and awakening

instances.span_text: fabric / freedom / rest / rock / basis / gates / hell / prevail

entailments: freedom is represented as a fabric or institution resting on rock and resisting gates of hell
Freedom is understood through built structure and biblical combat.
cmt.rival_reading: Abstract freedom is construed as a physical structure with a foundation and biblical fortification imagery.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule '' marked 8 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.
